diagnostics.message: Booster Compressor outlet pressure target is too close to suction pressure for the required compression duty.
Booster Compressor minimum flow bypass percent is below the current anti-surge review threshold.
Booster Compressor efficiency_percent=104 is outside the recommended operating range.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

message.content: {"status":"partial","request_id":"rf-suggest-edit-compressor-parameter-update-ordering-001","project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","answers":[{"id":"ans-1","type":"suggestion","content":"为 Booster Compressor (compressor-2) 提出三个参数候选修正，以解决诊断问题。所有更改均需要用户确认。","requires_confirmation":true}],"summary":"针对压缩机 unit compressor-2 及其配置参数，基于诊断 COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE、COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW 和 UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE 生成候选编辑提案。","issues":[{"code":"COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE","message":"出口压力目标 270 kPa 与入口压力 260 kPa 过于接近，无法满足压缩任务需求。","severity":"error","target_type":"unit","target_id":"compressor-2"},{"code":"COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW","message":"最小流量旁路百分比 2% 低于防喘振审查阈值，可能导致操作风险。","severity":"error","target_type":"unit","target_id":"compressor-2"},{"code":"UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE","message":"效率百分比 104% 超出推荐运行范围，可能造成计算结果不物理或收敛困难。","severity":"warning","target_type":"unit","target_id":"compressor-2"}],"proposed_actions":[{"title":"提高出口压力目标以避免压力比不足","target":"unit:compressor-2","rationale":"诊断 COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE 提示当前出口压力 270 kPa 与入口 260 kPa 几乎相同，无法完成有效的压缩。需要适当提高出口压力目标。","patch":{"parameter_updates":[{"target_type":"unit","target_id":"compressor-2","config":{"outlet_pressure_target_kpa":{"spec_placeholder":true,"description":"建议值需要根据工艺流程确定，可能需要显著高于 270 kPa。","current_value":270}}}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-unit-0","snapshot-1"]},{"title":"增加最小流量旁路百分比以满足防喘振要求","target":"unit:compressor-2","rationale":"诊断 COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW 指示旁路百分比 2% 低于安全阈值，需提高至典型推荐值（如 10-20%）以保证设备安全。","patch":{"parameter_updates":[{"target_type":"unit","target_id":"compressor-2","config":{"minimum_flow_bypass_percent":{"spec_placeholder":true,"description":"建议值应至少为 10%，具体请参考机器数据表。","current_value":2}}}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-0","snapshot-1"]},{"title":"修正压缩机效率至合理范围","target":"unit:compressor-2","rationale":"诊断 UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE 表明效率值 104% 超出物理可能，典型压缩机效率应在 70-90% 左右。","patch":{"parameter_updates":[{"target_type":"unit","target_id":"compressor-2","config":{"efficiency_percent":{"spec_placeholder":true,"description":"建议值修正为典型效率，如 75% 到 85%，具体需与设备数据匹配。","current_value":104}}}]},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-0","snapshot-1"]}],"confidence":0.7,"citations":[{"id":"diag-1","source":"diagnostic_summary","code":"COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE"},{"id":"diag-2","source":"diagnostic_summary","code":"COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW"},{"id":"diag-3","source":"diagnostic_summary","code":"UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE"},{"id":"flowdoc-unit-0","source":"flowsheet_document","path":"units[0]"},{"id":"snapshot-1","source":"latest_snapshot"}],"requires_confirmation":true}

answers.text: 为 Booster Compressor (compressor-2) 提出三个参数候选修正，以解决诊断问题。所有更改均需要用户确认。

response.summary: 针对压缩机 unit compressor-2 及其配置参数，基于诊断 COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_TOO_CLOSE、COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_TOO_LOW 和 UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE 生成候选编辑提案。

issues.message: 出口压力目标 270 kPa 与入口压力 260 kPa 过于接近，无法满足压缩任务需求。
最小流量旁路百分比 2% 低于防喘振审查阈值，可能导致操作风险。
效率百分比 104% 超出推荐运行范围，可能造成计算结果不物理或收敛困难。

proposed_actions.title: 为 compressor-2 补充局部参数占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断集中在局部参数或配置完整性，因此更合适的是输出可审查的局部参数占位提案。
